'''B'arin Apma''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was one of the seventy-five [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] warriors who were selected by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] to help train elite [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] on [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]], as part of the one hundred members of the [[Cuy'val Dar]].

B'arin Apma dedicated his life to the principles of brotherhood, stamina, and loyalty, and, believing them to be as essential qualities in a superior soldier as marksmanship and courage, worked to instill them in the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] he trained.<ref name="Hasbro" />

Pale-skinned, [[Color/Legends|gray]]-eyed, and brown-haired, Apma wore his hair short and sported a narrow goatee on his chin. He wore silver-colored [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|Mandalorian armor]] over a gray jumpsuit, and was equipped with two [[WESTAR-34 blaster pistol/Legends|WESTAR-34 blaster pistols]] and a [[Z-6 jetpack/Legends|Z-6 jetpack]].<ref name="Hasbro" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:FullArmorBarinApma.jpg|thumb|left|B'arin Apma in full armor]]
B'arin Apma was created for the [[2007]] Entertainment Earth-exclusive seven-action figure pack "Republic Elite Forces: Mandalorians & Omega Squad," part of [[Hasbro]]'s ''[[Star Wars: 30th Anniversary Collection]]'' of action figures.<ref name="Hasbro" />

The actual figure comes with a Z-6 jetpack instead of the [[JT-12 jetpack/Legends|JT-12 jetpack]] style shown in the promo pictures and box art.<ref name="Hasbro" />
